texto: A free people ought not only to be armed and disciplined, but they should have sufficient arms and ammunition to maintain a status of independence from any who might attempt to abuse them, which would include their own government
autor: Spurious quote attributed to George Washington but never said by him .
explicacao: Orientação direta de Spurious quote attributed to George Washington but never said by him . sobre temas ligados a felicidade. A afirmação “A free people ought not only to be armed and disciplined, but they should have sufficient arms an…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a felicidade, happiness, liberty, útil em momentos de termino e liberty.
